description:
REQ-004 ("Standardize llm-cli-wrapper and llm-mcp-server integration contract") targets a crate that no longer exists. The `llm-mcp-server` crate was removed from the workspace. The MCP server now lives in `ops_mcp.rs` using the `rmcp` library.

Either mark REQ-004 as a new status like "superseded" or update its description to reflect the current MCP integration path. Also update REQ-005 and REQ-006 which reference llm-mcp-server in their acceptance criteria (REQ-006 says "four required binaries" but only 3 exist now).
title: Mark REQ-004 as obsolete — llm-mcp-server removed from workspace
